[package]
name = "ox_type_converter"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
authors = ["Your Name <your.email@example.com>"]
description = "A modular type conversion system for Rust"
license = "GPL-3.0-only"

[dependencies]
lazy_static = "1.4.0"
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
chrono = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde"] }

[lib]
name = "ox_type_converter"
path = "src/lib.rs"
[package]
name = "ox_callback_manager"
version = "0.1.0"
license = "GPL-3.0-only"
edition = "2024"

[dependencies]
lazy_static = "1.4.0"
